testcase.name: Webcam End-to-End Testing Suite › Console Error Monitoring Validation
testcase.failure:
[chromium] › webcam/webcam-e2e.spec.js:528:5 › Webcam End-to-End Testing Suite › Console Error Monitoring Validation
TimeoutError: locator.click: Timeout 10000ms exceeded. Call log: - waiting for locator('#refreshCamerasBtn') - locator resolved to <button type="button" id="refreshCamerasBtn" class="button secondary-btn">🔄 Refresh Camera List</button> - attempting click action 2 × waiting for element to be visible, enabled and stable - element is not visible - retrying click action - waiting 20ms 2 × waiting for element to be visible, enabled and stable - element is not visible - retrying click action - waiting 100ms 19 × waiting for element to be visible, enabled and stable - element is not visible - retrying click action - waiting 500ms
537 | 538 | // Perform various operations to trigger potential errors > 539 | await page.locator('#refreshCamerasBtn').click(); | ^ 540 | await page.waitForTimeout(2000); 541 | 542 | // Check if any console errors were captured at /home/remote/MonsterBox/tests/webcam/webcam-e2e.spec.js:539:50
